reasoning: Given the current observation, the Beer-Lambert Law states that Absorbance (A) is directly proportional to the path length (l), molar absorptivity (ε), and the concentration (c). However, since all the variables except for transmittance are constant in this observation, I will manipulate the concentration to see its effect on absorbance.
By decreasing the concentration in the previous step, I observed that the absorbance also decreased. Now, I will increase the path length to further confirm the relationship between these variables.

By increasing the path length to 3.0, I observe that the absorbance also increases accordingly, further confirming the Beer-Lambert Law. Now, I will decrease the molar absorptivity to test its effect on absorbance.
